message:
chore: add SQLite activity lock files to .gitignore

Ignore *.activity.lock files created by the agent mail server during
active database operations. These are transient runtime artifacts that
should never be committed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -270,3 +270,6 @@ test_screenshot.png
 
 # Literal tilde directory (created by agent mail git mailbox init)
 ~/
+
+# SQLite activity lock files
+*.activity.lock
